text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Super Creek have been a
success worthy of legends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And due to her overwhelming ability, a certain
old rumor makes a comeback.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Another overwhelming victory by Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She truly is a mighty wall standing in the way of
all the other Umamusume! Nobody can stop her!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Er, umm... All I did was run. Nothing special. I was
just lucky.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll run just like I always do next time too. I'm not
the type to do nasty things like getting in
people's way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Shiver... tremble...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sure. Where should we go? Anywhere you like!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Shiver... tremble...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that's actually pretty terrifyin'. It's like a
demon in the flesh.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's even more frightening because she's
always smiling...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And nobody knows what the two of 'em are really
like behind the scenes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Right? Who knew they'd be like that?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I want to play goo-goo babies today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I finished the race in a really cool manner, so now
I feel this urge to coddle...
choice_data_list: You've gotta do what you've gotta do.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yaaay, really?! Okay then...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Who's a good trainy-wainy? ♪ You are! Oh, yes
you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Super Creek becomes stronger, she sometimes
explodes with the desire to spoil me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to make sure she gets it out of her system
before anybody sees her like this, or they'll all get
creeped out.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another blowout by Super Creek! Is there no one
who can defeat her?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Today, I'm buying you a nice outfit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A massive win for Super Creek! Not a single racer
could even get near her from start to finish!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I want to swing you around in the middle
of the amusement park!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, super victorious! Just where does
she get this consistency from?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Let's take a dip toge—
choice_data_list: Nope! This is where I'm drawing the line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satisfying her urges to spoil me while also
keeping them hidden is a heroic feat in itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Super Creek is still her calm, kind self at all
other times.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you've come a very long way from when
we first met...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But lately, I've been feeling a bit confused.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, when I'm spoiling you, I feel like I'm
spoiling myself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's like you're indulging me by letting me do what
I want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. The line between spoiling and being
spoiled has become completely blurred.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That goes to show how deep our bond has
become—and the deeper it gets, the more
impressive Super Creek becomes.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I wanted more than to just spoil you when
we first met... Maybe there was some other reason
I was drawn to you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't imagine a normal day without you in it.
That's how much we've bonded.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I suppose fated encounters are a thing after all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How many such meetings do we get in a lifetime?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there's an answer to that question.
At any rate, this once-in-a-lifetime meeting will
never end.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In the future, if there's anything at all you want,
please continue to tell me. I'll win any race you
wish for.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But maybe my goal isn't actually to win races
anymore.
choice_data_list: Then what are you racing for?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, to display the trophies we've won...
together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
From a once-in-a-lifetime meeting to an enduring
path together.
